facilities.name: Natanz (FEP)
facilities.description: Main uranium enrichment facility. 50,000+ centrifuges pre-war. Destroyed in first-wave strikes Feb 28.

facilities.name: Fordow (FFEP)
facilities.description: Underground enrichment facility near Qom. Bunker-buster strikes caused partial collapse. Status uncertain.

facilities.name: Isfahan (UCF)
facilities.description: Uranium conversion facility. Secondary strikes damaged conversion lines. Partial operations may continue.

facilities.name: Arak (IR-40)
facilities.description: Heavy water reactor. Redesigned under JCPOA. Not targeted in initial strikes. Under IAEA monitoring pre-war.

facilities.name: Bushehr NPP
facilities.description: Civilian nuclear power plant (Russian-built). Not targeted — civilian infrastructure. Grid connection disrupted.

timeline.event: First strikes destroy Natanz centrifuge halls
Isfahan conversion facility hit in second wave
IAEA confirms loss of monitoring at all sites
Iran threatens to withdraw from NPT
Satellite imagery shows Fordow crater formations
Iran claims covert enrichment at undisclosed site
IAEA Board emergency session on Iran monitoring gap
